title: Memes and Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Memes and Evangelion             Quote Post by GAP » Mon Mar 12, 2012 12:28 pm While memes are memes, I wonder if Gendo is really as 'omniscient' as they claim or Rei is awesome or what not?

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Mon Mar 12, 2012 12:30 pm No we don't

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Mar 12, 2012 2:00 pm Gendo, like Anno, was making it up as he went along. Anyway, by the title, I thought you were meaning things like "She is cute, that is why she is called DONATE TO 4CHAN", or this -- http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P6uJqtgBOZ4

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Mar 12, 2012 5:40 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Gendo, like Anno, was making it up as he went along. Anyway, by the title, I thought you were meaning things like "She is cute, that is why she is called DONATE TO 4CHAN", or this -- http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P6uJqtgBOZ4

[]:             Quote Post by GAP » Mon Mar 12, 2012 7:00 pm I was refering to the memes concerning Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Mar 12, 2012 9:20 pm Everyone is turned into Tang.

[]:             Quote Post by Aiko Heiwa » Mon Mar 12, 2012 9:58 pm ^way to spoil the whole fucking series you jerk z0mg teh Rei

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Mar 12, 2012 10:03 pm ^ Sarcasm?

[]:             Quote Post by Xana » Mon Mar 12, 2012 10:39 pm Spin around, then say "cocks" ^ Well, it's been circulating around THAT BOARD for the last couple of days due to a NSFW Ritsuko/Maya doujin that was posted. At this rate, I really hope it will reach meme status! but I really doubt it, so I shouldn't get my hopes up

[]:             Quote Post by Elk » Mon Mar 26, 2012 4:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Gendo, like Anno, was making it up as he went along. Anyway, by the title, I thought you were meaning things like "She is cute, that is why she is called DONATE TO 4CHAN", or this -- http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P6uJqtgBOZ4

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 27, 2012 1:14 am ytmnds on YouTube make my head hurt... Here's the original: http://theendof4chan.ytmnd.com/

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 27, 2012 12:02 pm Xana wrote: Spin around, then say "cocks" ^ Well, it's been circulating around THAT BOARD for the last couple of days due to a NSFW Ritsuko/Maya doujin that was posted.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Mon Apr 09, 2012 6:20 pm Perhaps you're looking for this? Spoilers at your own risk. Also, this is my favorite.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Tue Apr 10, 2012 6:45 am Henry Spencer wrote: Perhaps you're looking for this? Spoilers at your own risk. Also, this is my favorite.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Apr 10, 2012 12:53 pm Henry Spencer wrote: Perhaps you're looking for this? Spoilers at your own risk.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Tue Apr 10, 2012 5:42 pm driftking18594 wrote: I prefer this .

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Tue Apr 10, 2012 6:34 pm Henry Spencer wrote: Ah, that's a good one too. I just think that Gendo shooting a puppy is too fitting. Plus, there's Boo's reaction at the very end.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Tue Apr 10, 2012 6:54 pm driftking18594 wrote: I wanna see "Asukowned" emerge as Gendowned's successor after Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Apr 11, 2012 7:58 am Henry Spencer wrote: Got the sauce for that? I've got an account there and I can fix that up in no time.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Ma
